reference: If he will not take any further treatment, then it is almost certain that the tumor will return. Normally, further treatment includes radiotherapy and chemotherapy. However, in the absence of such treatment, he will become symptomatic within three months. His probable survival after that will be another three to six months. I suggest that you encourage him to pursue treatment.
text: If people want to take anything with food, then it is almost certain that the tumor is a cell. No new sort of treatment includes radiotherapy or chemotherapy. However, when you add chemo to such treatments, tumor becomes something like a complete mass. It's probably survival after that with another 30%. I suggest that you use caretaking for surgical.
